things.name: To Sua Ocean Trench
things.description: 30m deep turquoise swimming hole connected to the sea through lava tubes

things.name: Piula Cave Pool
things.description: Freshwater spring under the sea accessed through an underwater arch

things.name: Robert Louis Stevenson Museum (Vailima)
things.description: Stevenson's final home preserved as a museum - buried on the hilltop above

things.name: Faleolo Beach & Palm-Lined Coast
things.description: Samoa's finest beach drive with stunning tropical scenery

things.name: Apia Market
things.description: Fresh fish, taro, palusami and oka (raw fish marinated in coconut cream)

things.name: Papapapaitai Falls
things.description: One of Samoa's most spectacular waterfalls plunging into the forest below

things.name: O Le Pupu-Pu'e National Park
things.description: Lava tubes, dense jungle and the south coast lava flows to the sea

things.name: Falealupo Canopy Walk
things.description: Treetop walkway in the last intact lowland rainforest on Savai'i

things.name: Manono Island Day Trip
things.description: Car-free island with a 3km village walk past traditional fale houses

things.name: Sa (Evening Prayers) Ceremony
things.description: Every village rings a bell at 6pm for mandatory family prayers - visitors must stop
